title: Glazed Algerian Eggplant Fritters
description: Crispy, aerated fritters of diced eggplant bound with chickpea flour and flaxseed, finished with a sharp white vinegar glaze.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: 2 tbsp for frying, 1 tbsp for glaze

instructions: Heat 2 cups of olive oil in a deep pan to 180°C until shimmering.
Whisk together 120g chickpea flour, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp cumin, and 1/2 tsp smoked paprika with 120ml water until the batter is smooth.
In a small bowl, combine 1 tbsp flaxseed meal with 3 tbsp water, let sit for 5 minutes until it thickens into a gel.
Fold the flaxseed gel into the batter, then stir in 300g diced eggplant, 2 tbsp chopped parsley, and 1 tbsp white vinegar until the vegetables are evenly coated.
Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the hot oil, frying each fritter for 3-4 minutes per side until golden brown and crisp.
Remove the fritters with a slotted spoon and drain them on paper towels.
In a small saucepan, heat 1 tbsp of olive oil, add 1 tbsp white vinegar, and simmer for 1 minute until slightly thickened.
Drizzle the glaze over the hot fritters and serve immediately.
